summary: Completed testing of Microsoft Outlook Calendar OAuth integration (Phase B). All 13 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Outlook integration card shows correctly on /admin/availability page with connect button, status text, and legend entries.
critical_code_review_comments: OAuth flow correctly generates auth_url with tenant_id, client_id, redirect_uri, and scopes
Token management uses refresh_token for automatic renewal before expiry
UserCalendarIntegration and AvailabilityBlock models properly defined with all required fields
Sync function fetches 30 days of events and upserts blocks with external_event_id tracking
Override toggle preserves user preference even when events are deleted from Outlook
All endpoints properly require authentication except /callback
Frontend correctly handles OAuth popup with postMessage communication
Legend includes all required entries: Dostupný, Blokace, Outlook blok, Ručně povoleno, Nedostupný
context_for_next_testing_agent: Microsoft Outlook Calendar integration fully tested. OAuth flow: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/connect returns auth_url with correct tenant_id (20ae0ab5-26f4-4b52-bb71-55de86a0fc89). Status: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/status returns {connected: false/true}. Disconnect: POST /api/microsoft-calendar/disconnect works even when not connected. Blocks: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/blocks accepts user_id, start, end params. Override: POST /api/microsoft-calendar/blocks/{id}/override returns 404 for non-existent blocks. Sync: POST /api/microsoft-calendar/sync returns 404 when not connected. Frontend: LecturerAvailabilityPage shows Outlook card with data-testid='outlook-integration-card', connect button with data-testid='connect-outlook-btn' (blue bg-blue-600 styling with ExternalLink icon), status text 'Nepřipojeno — události z Outlooku neblokují rezervace', and legend with 'Outlook blok' and 'Ručně povoleno' entries.

verified_features.feature: Backend: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/status returns {connected: false} when no integration exists
Backend: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/connect returns {auth_url: 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/...'} with correct tenant ID, client_id, redirect_uri, and scopes
Backend: POST /api/microsoft-calendar/disconnect returns success message (even if not connected)
Backend: GET /api/microsoft-calendar/blocks returns empty array when no blocks exist
Backend: POST /api/microsoft-calendar/blocks/{block_id}/override returns 404 for non-existent block
Frontend: LecturerAvailabilityPage shows Outlook integration card with 'Připojit Outlook' button when not connected
Frontend: Outlook card shows status text 'Nepřipojeno — události z Outlooku neblokují rezervace'
Frontend: Legend includes 'Outlook blok' and 'Ručně povoleno' entries
Frontend: Connect button is styled blue with ExternalLink icon
